text:
Created attachment 194041
svn diff

Infernal is a tool for searching DNA sequence database for RNA structure and sequence similarities. The Rfam database of RNA families is based on Infernal, and we can search DNA sequences for structural homologs of Rfam families.

WWW: http://eddylab.org/infernal/


Tested by: poudriere testport (amd64/i386 11.1/10.4) & make test (amd64/i386 11.1)
